summary: Frontend RBAC Testing Complete - All permission checks passed. Verified that Admin sees all action buttons while Player (jogador) sees none of the management buttons across Calendar, Members, and Championship pages.

tests: Admin CAN see 'Novo Evento' button
Admin CAN see event action menus (edit, delete, convocar)
Admin CAN see 'Importar Excel' button
Admin CAN see 'Novo Membro' button
Admin CAN see member action menus
Admin CAN see 'Adicionar Jogo' button
Admin CAN see match edit button
Admin CAN see match result button
Admin CAN see match stats button
Admin CAN see match lineup button
Admin CAN see match delete button
Admin CAN see 'Definições Clube' menu item
Player CANNOT see 'Novo Evento' button
Player CAN view Calendar page (read-only access)
Player CANNOT see 'Importar Excel' button
Player CANNOT see 'Novo Membro' button
Player CAN view Members page (read-only access)
Player CANNOT see 'Adicionar Jogo' button
Player CANNOT see match edit button
Player CANNOT see match delete button
Player CAN view Championship Detail page (read-only access)
Player CAN view match cards (read-only)
Player CANNOT see 'Definições Clube' menu item

critical_code_review_comments: usePermissions() hook correctly provides role-based permission checks
Calendar.jsx properly uses canManageEvents and canCreateConvocations for button visibility
Members.jsx properly uses canManageTeam and canImportData for button visibility
ChampionshipDetail.jsx properly uses canManageEvents, canManageStats, canManageLineups, canImportData for button visibility
Sidebar.jsx properly uses effectiveRole to hide 'Definições Clube' for non-admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend RBAC implementation fully tested and working. The usePermissions() hook from PermissionsContext.jsx correctly provides role-based access control. Admin users see all action buttons while Player (jogador) users see read-only views without management buttons. Key components tested: Calendar.jsx, Members.jsx, ChampionshipDetail.jsx, Sidebar.jsx. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.

test_categories: Admin Calendar Page (2 checks) - Novo Evento button, action menus
Admin Members Page (3 checks) - Import, Create, action menus
Admin Championship Page (6 checks) - Add match, edit, result, stats, lineup, delete
Admin Sidebar (1 check) - Definições Clube visibility
Player Calendar Page (2 checks) - No Novo Evento, read-only access
Player Members Page (3 checks) - No Import, No Create, read-only access
Player Championship Page (5 checks) - No Add match, No edit, No delete, read-only access
Player Sidebar (1 check) - No Definições Clube
